g.text: Saare systems yahan se request karte hain

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does web app send requests to API Gateway?')
sendPrompt('How does mobile app communicate with API Gateway?')
sendPrompt('How does chatbot send requests through API Gateway?')
sendPrompt('How do external third party APIs use the API Gateway?')

g.text: Har request yahan process hoti hai

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does API Gateway handle authentication and authorization?')
sendPrompt('How does rate limiting work in API Gateway?')
sendPrompt('How does request routing work in API Gateway?')
sendPrompt('How does request and response transformation work in API Gateway?')
sendPrompt('How does API Gateway route to Node.js backend?')
sendPrompt('How does API Gateway connect to ML service?')
sendPrompt('How does API Gateway connect to auth service?')
sendPrompt('How does API Gateway connect to n8n webhooks?')
sendPrompt('How does API Gateway logging and monitoring work?')
g.text: Request logs · Latency · Error rates · Tracing · Dashboards

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does API Gateway send response back to client?')
g.text: JSON · Status codes · Caching · Compression · Error messages

svg.text: n8n anomaly detect kare toh auto-block ya alert trigger kar sakta hai
